positive: A symmetrical, central composition featuring a celestial crescent moon intertwining with bioluminescent flowering vines and stylized starburst geometry. The style should be a highly detailed, modern Art Nouveau illustration, utilizing clean vector line work and bold graphic silhouettes. Color palette is limited to deep indigo, burnt orange, muted gold, and creamy white. Emphasize strong, clean contrast and sharp edges, making it highly suitable for a single-color screen print on fabric. High visual impact, minimalist yet intricate.
